errors.loadFallback: Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.loadData: We couldn't load your dashboard data.

greeting.onboardingNamed: Welcome, {name}. Let's set up your workspace.
greeting.activeNamed: Welcome back, {name}. Here's what needs your attention.

onboarding.title: Build your workspace in three steps
onboarding.description: Slothing works best once it has your resume, a target role, and a place to draft tailored documents.

today.title: Today
today.description: Three focused actions, then you are done.
today.uploadResumeContext: Create the source material for tailored applications.
today.reviewNewTitle: Review {count, plural, one {# new opportunity} other {# new opportunities}}
today.reviewNewContext: Decide what belongs in your pipeline.
today.prepareInterviewsContext: Turn active opportunities into practice prompts.
today.draftFollowUpContext: Keep recruiters warm with a reusable email.
today.tailoredDocumentContext: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} ready to reuse.

readiness.description: Your application materials at a glance.
readiness.documentsDetail: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} in your bank
readiness.tailoredDetail: {count, plural, one {# resume} other {# resumes}} built

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.empty: Add opportunities to see your pipeline.

recent.title: Recent opportunities
recent.description: The latest items saved to your workspace.
recent.emptyDescription: Save or import opportunities to start tracking them here.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.description: Review saved opportunities, compare fit signals, and keep application work moving from one list.

empty.noMatchesDescription: Try widening or clearing filters to see more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your AI provider for resume parsing and interview preparation.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used for navigation and app screens.
language.label: Language

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Keep the source profile Slothing uses for resumes, cover letters, and fit checks.

unsavedChanges.prompt: You have unsaved profile changes. Leave without saving?

answerBankPrompt.text: Want richer profile details? Save reusable stories and facts in your answer bank.

emptyState.title: Let's set up your profile
emptyState.description: Start from a resume so Slothing can fill in the basics, or open the form and add details manually.
emptyState.uploadResume: Upload your resume to fill this in

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: The headline and photo that introduce you across generated materials.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Links and contact details you are comfortable reusing.

summary.title: Professional summary
summary.description: A concise career summary Slothing can adapt for different roles.

savedSignals.title: Saved profile signals
savedSignals.description: Structured details imported from resumes, opportunities, and onboarding.

careerDetails.title: Career details
careerDetails.description: Experience and project highlights currently powering your generated documents.

workStyle.title: Work style
workStyle.description: Choose the roles and environments you want Slothing to prioritize.

targetRoles.title: Target roles
targetRoles.description: List titles or tracks you want generated materials to emphasize.

salary.title: Compensation target
salary.description: Optional salary range used for fit checks and opportunity comparisons.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control how your profile is reused across recruiter-facing workflows.

openToRecruiters.title: Open to recruiter outreach
openToRecruiters.description: Allow generated materials to mention that you are open to recruiter conversations.

shareContactInfo.title: Share contact info by default
shareContactInfo.description: Include email, phone, and links in exported recruiter-facing documents.

completeness.summary: Profile is {score}% complete · {count, plural, one {# quick win available} other {# quick wins available}}

gaps.contact-info: Add your name, email, and headline

experience-bullets.role: Add {missing, plural, one {# more bullet} other {# more bullets}} to your {company} role

quantified-bullets.empty: Add {missing, plural, one {# quantified bullet} other {# quantified bullets}}
quantified-bullets.role: Add {missing, plural, one {# quantified bullet} other {# quantified bullets}} to your {company} role

gaps.skills: Add {missing, plural, one {# more skill} other {# more skills}}
